# FirstJobIndia

Your First Job, Our First Priority. FirstJobIndia helps freshers and first-time job seekers across India find verified roles, build recruiter-ready resumes, and follow a step-by-step career roadmap.

## Public pages

- [Home](https://www.firstjobindia.in/): Fresher jobs, resume builder, and Career GPS in one place.
- [Fresher jobs](https://www.firstjobindia.in/jobs): Browse verified openings filtered by role, city, and salary.
- [Resume builder](https://www.firstjobindia.in/resume): Free guided builder with recruiter-ready templates and PDF download.
- [Career GPS](https://www.firstjobindia.in/career-gps): Readiness analytics for Indian freshers; scores resume, skills, exams, and study-abroad signals.
- [College partner platform](https://www.firstjobindia.in/college): Campus placement workflow for colleges and universities.
- [React interview e-book](https://www.firstjobindia.in/e-book): Curated React interview questions for fresher and junior frontend roles.
- [Career advice blog](https://www.firstjobindia.in/blog): Articles on resumes, interviews, and choosing a career path.
- [About FirstJobIndia](https://www.firstjobindia.in/about-us): Mission, services, and how the platform works.
- [Send feedback](https://www.firstjobindia.in/reviews): Feedback, bug reports, and feature requests.
- [Privacy policy](https://www.firstjobindia.in/privacy-policy)
- [Terms and conditions](https://www.firstjobindia.in/terms)
